series_metadata.series_title: Studio Transmitter Links, Translators, and Transmitters
series_metadata.series_description: A) Studio Transmitter Links - Interconnection Relay Hops: originals of Federal Communication Commission (FCC) documents filed by site location. B) Translators: FCC materials by site location. C) Transmitters: owned and operated by the Ohio Educational Television Network Commission (OETNC) and transferred to affiliated stations.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: be retained in accordance with FCC rules (September 23, 1974) on maintenance of local files available public inspection
